targets.query:
from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ELcompute: (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Malloc"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_core_w"] then r["assumed_P_core_w"] else 95.0) / ((1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0) * 1769.0),
      ELmemory:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_mem_w"] then r["assumed_P_mem_w"] else 0.392) / (1024.0 * (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)),
      ELstorage: (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_storage_w"] then r["assumed_P_storage_w"] else 0.0012) / (1073741824.0 * (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)),
      Enetwork:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] then r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] else 0.001) / 1073741824.0
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r.ELcompute + r.ELmemory + r.ELstorage + r.Enetwork }))
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ES3active: (((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ES3idle:   (((((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] else 0.0))) + ((if exists r["assumed_N_inv"] then r["assumed_N_inv"] else 4.0) * (if exists r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] then r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] else 32666.0) )) / 1073741824.0) * ((if exists r["assumed_P_idle_w"] then r["assumed_P_idle_w"] else 18.5) / ((if exists r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] then r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] else 5120.0) * 1000.0))
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r.ES3active + r.ES3idle }))
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({

  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r.EDB }))

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      EAPI: (((if exists r["api_API_LAPI"] then r["api_API_LAPI"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] then r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] else 95.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r.EAPI }))
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ERekog: (((if exists r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] then r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] then (if r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] > 0.0 then r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] else 70.0) else 70.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r.ERekog }))
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ELcompute: (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Malloc"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_core_w"] then r["assumed_P_core_w"] else 95.0) / ((1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0) * 1769.0),
      ELmemory:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_mem_w"] then r["assumed_P_mem_w"] else 0.392) / (1024.0 * (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)),
      ELstorage: (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_storage_w"] then r["assumed_P_storage_w"] else 0.0012) / (1073741824.0 * (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)),
      Enetwork:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] then r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] else 0.001) / 1073741824.0,
      ES3active: (((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ES3idle:   (((((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] else 0.0))) + ((if exists r["assumed_N_inv"] then r["assumed_N_inv"] else 4.0) * (if exists r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] then r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] else 32666.0) )) / 1073741824.0) * ((if exists r["assumed_P_idle_w"] then r["assumed_P_idle_w"] else 18.5) / ((if exists r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] then r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] else 5120.0) * 1000.0)),
      EDB: (((if exists r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EAPI: (((if exists r["api_API_LAPI"] then r["api_API_LAPI"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] then r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] else 95.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ERekog: (((if exists r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] then r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] then (if r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] > 0.0 then r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] else 70.0) else 70.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      PUE: (if exists r["assumed_PUE"] then r["assumed_PUE"] else 1.15),
      GEF: (if exists r["grid_emission_factor"] then r["grid_emission_factor"] else 541.0)
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: (r.ELcompute + r.ELmemory + r.ELstorage + r.Enetwork + r.ES3active + r.ES3idle + r.EDB + r.EAPI + r.ERekog) * r.PUE * r.GEF / 1000.0 }))
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

      Enetwork:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] then r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] else 0.001) / 1073741824.0,
      ES3active: (((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ES3idle:   (((((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] else 0.0))) + ((if exists r["assumed_N_inv"] then r["assumed_N_inv"] else 4.0) * (if exists r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] then r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] else 32666.0) )) / 1073741824.0) * ((if exists r["assumed_P_idle_w"] then r["assumed_P_idle_w"] else 18.5) / ((if exists r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] then r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] else 5120.0) * 1000.0)),
      EDB: (((if exists r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EAPI: (((if exists r["api_API_LAPI"] then r["api_API_LAPI"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] then r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] else 95.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ERekog: (((if exists r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] then r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] then (if r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] > 0.0 then r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] else 70.0) else 70.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      PUE: (if exists r["assumed_PUE"] then r["assumed_PUE"] else 1.15),
      GEF: (if exists r["grid_emission_factor"] then r["grid_emission_factor"] else 541.0)
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: (r.ELcompute + r.ELmemory + r.ELstorage + r.Enetwork + r.ES3active + r.ES3idle + r.EDB + r.EAPI + r.ERekog) * r.PUE * r.GEF / 1000.0 }))
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ELcompute: (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Malloc"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tcpu"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tcpu"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Malloc"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Malloc"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_core_w"] then r["assumed_P_core_w"] else 95.0) / ((1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0) * 1769.0),
      ELmemory:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_mem_w"] then r["assumed_P_mem_w"] else 0.392) / (1024.0 * (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)),
      ELstorage: (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_storage_w"] then r["assumed_P_storage_w"] else 0.0012) / (1073741824.0 * (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)),
      Enetwork:  (((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] then r["assumed_E_network_kwh_gb"] else 0.001) / 1073741824.0,
      ES3active: (((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ES3idle:   (((((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] else 0.0))) + ((if exists r["assumed_N_inv"] then r["assumed_N_inv"] else 4.0) * (if exists r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] then r["assumed_S_upload_mb"] else 32666.0) )) / 1073741824.0) * ((if exists r["assumed_P_idle_w"] then r["assumed_P_idle_w"] else 18.5) / ((if exists r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] then r["assumed_C_mem_gb"] else 5120.0) * 1000.0)),
      EDB: (((if exists r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_active_w"] then r["assumed_P_active_w"] else 18.5) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EAPI: (((if exists r["api_API_LAPI"] then r["api_API_LAPI"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] then r["assumed_P_Proc_w"] else 95.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ERekog: (((if exists r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] then r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] else 0.0))) * (if exists r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] then (if r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] > 0.0 then r["assumed_P_GPU_w"] else 70.0) else 70.0) / (1000.0 * 3600.0 * 1000.0)
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with Lambda_Compute: r.ELcompute, Lambda_Memory: r.ELmemory, Lambda_Storage: r.ELstorage, Lambda_Network: r.Enetwork, S3_Active: r.ES3active, S3_Idle: r.ES3idle, DynamoDB: r.EDB, API: r.EAPI, Rekognition: r.ERekog }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "Lambda_Compute", "Lambda_Memory", "Lambda_Storage", "Lambda_Network", "S3_Active", "S3_Idle", "DynamoDB", "API", "Rekognition"])
